title: ARCHIVED - British Columbia - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - British Columbia - 2018 Income Tax Package

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
- File online - There are a variety of software products to meet your needs, some of which are free.
- Filing online is fast, easy, and secure. Let us walk you through it step by step. For more information about online filing, go to Get ready to file your 2018 income tax return .
- Income Tax and Benefit Guide - 2018
- Income Tax and Benefit Return - British Columbia
- Worksheet for the return
- Schedule 1 - Federal Tax
- Worksheet for Schedule 1
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2018
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Working Income Tax Benefit - British Columbia
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2018
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings

## Provincial information and forms
- Information Sheet - Residents of British Columbia
- Worksheet BC428 - British Columbia
- Form BC428 - British Columbia Tax
- Form BC479 - British Columbia Credits
- Schedule BC(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule BC(S11) - Provincial Tuition and Education Amounts
